summary: Sprint 2 testing of SignDevis: (1) Link-document dialog, (2) Drag&drop SignaturePositionEditor, (3) restyled signer right panel. Backend 5/5 new tests PASS. Frontend critical UX flows verified: admin login, upload, generate code, open Link Dialog, link child PDF, open custom-position editor with live coords and page-nav.
action_items: Optional: signer-page end-to-end (multi-doc tabs + draw + Confirmer la signature) was not fully exercised via UI due to a Playwright login selector hiccup on retry — backend test test_sign_multi_doc covers the API path and passes (documents_signed=2). Main agent can self-verify the unified-card visuals with a quick manual check.
Login username input has no type='text' attribute (only the placeholder 'utilisateur'); consider adding type='text' + name='username' + data-testid='input-username' to harden future Playwright tests.
critical_code_review_comments: SignaturePositionEditor.jsx — useEffect cleanup references blobUrl from the closure (line ~88-91) but blobUrl may have been mutated by setBlobUrl(url) inside the same effect; the revoke targets the OLD blobUrl. Low impact, but should pass blobUrl via ref or local var for clean revocation.

SignaturePositionEditor: resize math computes ny = startBox.y - (nh - startBox.height) — this shifts the box upward in PDF coords as you resize, which visually grows downward (correct), but the box can exit the page (clamped to 0). OK but could also clamp nh against pageHeightPts - drag.startBox.y to never push y negative before clamp.
AdminDashboard.jsx is 928 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend extracting the Link-Document Dialog and Types-Manager Dialog into their own components for maintainability.

/api/files/{id}/fields PATCH does not validate the inner shape of each field (e.g. that signature fields have x/y/width/height/page). FastAPI accepts arbitrary objects in the fields array. Consider Pydantic field-level validation.

Backend access endpoint /api/access/file/{code} returns full content_b64 publicly (gated only by code). No rate limiting in place — recommend a per-IP throttle on /api/access/* to mitigate code bruteforce.
seed_data_creation: Created parent + child PDFs (TEST_*.pdf) via reportlab during pytest run; pytest fixture cleans them up. Two extra PDFs (p1.pdf, p2.pdf, r1.pdf) left in DB from Playwright runs — admin can delete via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Sprint 2 covered by /app/backend/tests/test_sprint2.py (5 tests, all pass): parent+child linking via POST /api/files/upload with parent_id, /api/files/{id}/linked, /api/access/file/{code} returns >=2 docs with content_b64 and no _id, PATCH /api/files/{id}/fields with signature field type, multi-doc sign all (documents_signed >= 2). Frontend Playwright: login requires clicking 'Gestionnaire' tab first; then fill input[type='password'] and the first input.  Link dialog testid is 'link-form'. Editor testid 'signature-position-editor'; box testid 'editor-box'; coords readout 'editor-coords'; clear button 'btn-pos-clear'; save 'btn-pos-editor-save'. Backend uses SQLite at /app/backend/soizic.db.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All Sprint 2 features (Link Dialog, Drag&Drop position editor, multi-doc sign) function as designed. Minor improvements suggested above.
